title: The Neutrality Project — who's the most neutral AI?
voiceStyle: Narrate clearly and evenly, like a credible explainer — engaged but calm and non-partisan:

scenes.text: The most politically *neutral* AI right now? It's *Grok*.
scenes.voiceSegment: The most politically neutral AI right now? It's Grok.

scenes.text: Every AI has a *political lean* — baked in.
scenes.voiceSegment: Here's something most people don't realize: every AI chatbot leans a certain way on hot topics — baked in, whether it tells you or not.

scenes.label: questions — a political survey
scenes.voiceSegment: An independent group, The Neutrality Project, decided to measure it. They gave 18 AIs the same kind of political survey a person would take — almost 4,000 questions.
Almost every one leaned left — its answers favored progressive views. Across 18 AIs and six topics, that's 108 scores. 97 of them tilted left.
But here's the twist. On the map, closer to the middle means more neutral — and Elon Musk's Grok landed right on the line. The most balanced of all.

annotations.text: Closer to the middle = more neutral
Grok lands right on the line

scenes.label: Phi-4 dodged 1 in 4
scenes.voiceSegment: The most one-sided? Microsoft's Phi-4 — which also refused to answer one in four questions. And dodging is its own kind of bias.
To keep it fair, AIs from three different countries decided what counts as left or right — so no single country's politics set the rules.

scenes.text: Its lean becomes *your* news, emails, homework
scenes.voiceSegment: Why care? This is the AI writing your emails, your kid's homework, your news summary. If it leans, your information leans too — quietly.

scenes.text: It has a side. Most neutral: Grok — check the rest.
scenes.voiceSegment: So next time an AI explains the news to you, remember: it has a side. The most balanced one is Grok — now you can check the rest yourself.
